retrieved_result: Welcome to Moe's! "Welcome to Moe's!From the second you walk into a Moe's, you'll notice there's something different. You actually feel welcomed. Ever since our employees at the first location in Atlanta, GA in the year 2000 shouted \"Welcome to Moe's!\" \u2013 which probably scared the bejesus out of those first guests \u2013

combined_text_for_llm: Welcome to Moe's! "Welcome to Moe's!From the second you walk into a Moe's, you'll notice there's something different. You actually feel welcomed. Ever since our employees at the first location in Atlanta, GA in the year 2000 shouted ""Welcome to Moe's!"" – which probably scared the bejesus out of those first guests –

history.title: Welcome to Moe's!
history.description: "Welcome to Moe's!From the second you walk into a Moe's, you'll notice there's something different. You actually feel welcomed. Ever since our employees at the first location in Atlanta, GA in the year 2000 shouted ""Welcome to Moe's!"" – which probably scared the bejesus out of those first guests –
